title: The Modern R1 University: Unpacking the Carnegie Classifications — D-RED Seminar Slides (EAB)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-04-02 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'The Modern R1 University: Unpacking the Carnegie Classifications and Pathways to Research Growth in 2025' presented by Jon Barnhart, Director of Research Advisory Services at EAB. Analyzes the 2025 Carnegie R1 classification methodology and outlines pathways for institutions like MSU to grow their research enterprise. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/ww24S4Wkwm6-lpU1Ikof-NE-L5CAiAenSGlWP3LpYZBWlKiNGAnV-J7asUQU7hJf.rIB4Q72FrKNgy68S
